heading: (intro)
raw: Directed by Michel Gondry. Written by Charlie Kaufman and Michel Gondry.
clean: Directed by Michel Gondry. Written by Charlie Kaufman and Michel Gondry.

heading: Joel Barish
raw: Sand is overrated. It's just tiny little rocks.
clean: Sand is overrated. It's just tiny little rocks.

heading: Joel Barish
raw: Why do I fall in love with every woman I see who shows me the least bit of attention?
clean: Why do I fall in love with every woman I see who shows me the least bit of attention?

heading: Joel Barish
raw: I'm constitutionally incapable of making eye-contact with a woman I don't know.
clean: I'm constitutionally incapable of making eye-contact with a woman I don't know.

heading: Joel Barish
raw: She was nice. Nice is good.
clean: She was nice. Nice is good.

heading: Joel Barish
raw: Random thoughts for Valentine's Day, 2004. Today is a holiday invented by greeting card companies. To make people feel like crap.
clean: Random thoughts for Valentine's Day, 2004. Today is a holiday invented by greeting card companies. To make people feel like crap.

heading: Joel Barish
raw: This is working like gangbusters!
clean: This is working like gangbusters!

heading: Joel Barish
raw: Constantly talking isn't necessarily communicating.
clean: Constantly talking isn't necessarily communicating.

heading: Joel Barish
raw: Are we like those bored couples you feel sorry for in restaurants? Are we the dining dead?
clean: Are we like those bored couples you feel sorry for in restaurants? Are we the dining dead?

heading: Joel Barish
raw: It's all being wiped away.
clean: It's all being wiped away.

heading: Joel Barish
raw: I could die right now, I'm just … happy. I've never felt that before. I'm just exactly where I want to be.
clean: I could die right now, I'm just ... happy. I've never felt that before. I'm just exactly where I want to be.

heading: Joel Barish
raw: I loved you on this day. I love this memory.
clean: I loved you on this day. I love this memory.

heading: Joel Barish
raw: I ditched work today. Took a train out to Montauk. I don't know why, I'm not an impulsive person.
clean: I ditched work today. Took a train out to Montauk. I don't know why, I'm not an impulsive person.

heading: Clementine Kruczynski
raw: Drink up, young man. It'll make the whole seduction part less repugnant.
clean: Drink up, young man. It'll make the whole seduction part less repugnant.

heading: Clementine Kruczynski
raw: I'm always anxious thinking I'm not living my life to the fullest, you know? Taking advantage of every possibility? Just making sure that I'm not wasting one second of the little time I have.
clean: I'm always anxious thinking I'm not living my life to the fullest, you know? Taking advantage of every possibility? Just making sure that I'm not wasting one second of the little time I have.

heading: Clementine Kruczynski
raw: … you stop listening to what is true, and what is true is constantly changing.
clean: ... you stop listening to what is true, and what is true is constantly changing.

heading: Clementine Kruczynski
raw: I apply my personality in a paste.
clean: I apply my personality in a paste.

heading: Clementine Kruczynski
raw: I'm a vindictive little bitch, truth be told.
clean: I'm a vindictive little bitch, truth be told.

heading: Clementine Kruczynski
raw: I'm not a concept. Too many guys think I'm a concept or I complete them or I'm going to make them alive, but I'm just a fucked up girl who is looking for my own peace of mind. Don't assign me yours.
clean: I'm not a concept. Too many guys think I'm a concept or I complete them or I'm going to make them alive, but I'm just a fucked up girl who is looking for my own peace of mind. Don't assign me yours.

heading: Clementine Kruczynski
raw: You look familiar. Ever shop at Barnes & Noble?
clean: You look familiar. Ever shop at Barnes & Noble?

heading: Clementine Kruczynski
raw: I don't need nice. I don't need myself to be it, and I don't need anybody else to be it at me.
clean: I don't need nice. I don't need myself to be it, and I don't need anybody else to be it at me.

heading: Clementine Kruczynski
raw: People don’t understand how lonely it is to be a kid.
clean: People don't understand how lonely it is to be a kid.

heading: Mary Svevo
raw: [Quoting Alexander Pope] "How happy is the blameless vestal's lot!The world forgetting, by the world forgot.Eternal sunshine of the spotless mind!Each prayer accepted, and each wish resigned."
clean: How happy is the blameless vestal's lot!The world forgetting, by the world forgot.Eternal sunshine of the spotless mind!Each prayer accepted, and each wish resigned.

heading: Mary Svevo
raw: [Quoting Friedrich Nietzsche] "Blessed are the forgetful: for they get the better even of their blunders."
clean: Blessed are the forgetful: for they get the better even of their blunders.

heading: Mary Svevo
raw: Adults are, like, this mess of sadness and phobias.
clean: Adults are, like, this mess of sadness and phobias.

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: I don't know what that is.

heading: Quotes

clean: Huckleberry Hound! Oh my darling, oh my darling, oh my darling Clementine.

raw: Joel: I don't know what that means.

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: It's been suggested.
clean: It's been suggested.

heading: Quotes
raw: Clementine: You're not a stalker or anything, right?
clean: You're not a stalker or anything, right?

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: I'm not a stalker. You're the one that talked to me, remember?
clean: I'm not a stalker. You're the one that talked to me, remember?

heading: Quotes
raw: Clementine: That is the oldest trick in the stalker book.
clean: That is the oldest trick in the stalker book.

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: Really? There's a stalker book? Great, I gotta read that one.
clean: Really? There's a stalker book? Great, I gotta read that one.

heading: Quotes
raw: Clementine: Joel, I'm not a concept. Too many guys think I'm a concept or I complete them or I'm going to make them alive, but I'm just a fucked up girl who is looking for my own peace of mind. Don't assign me yours.
clean: Joel, I'm not a concept. Too many guys think I'm a concept or I complete them or I'm going to make them alive, but I'm just a fucked up girl who is looking for my own peace of mind. Don't assign me yours.

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: I remember that speech really well.

heading: Quotes
raw: Clementine: I had you pegged, didn't I?
clean: I had you pegged, didn't I?

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: You had the whole human race pegged.
clean: You had the whole human race pegged.

heading: Quotes
raw: Clementine: Probably.

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: I still thought you were going to save me. Even after that.
clean: I still thought you were going to save me. Even after that.

heading: Quotes
raw: Clementine: I know.
clean: I know.

heading: Quotes
raw: Clementine: This is it, Joel. It's going to be gone soon.
clean: This is it, Joel. It's going to be gone soon.

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: I know.

heading: Quotes
raw: Clementine: What do we do??

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: Enjoy it.

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: I'm in my head already, aren't I?
clean: I'm in my head already, aren't I?

heading: Quotes
raw: Howard: I suppose so. This – this is about what it would look like.
clean: I suppose so. This - this is about what it would look like.

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: [in the house on the beach] I really should go! I've gotta catch my ride.
clean: I really should go! I've gotta catch my ride.

heading: Quotes
raw: Clementine: So go.
clean: So go.

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: I did. I thought maybe you were a nut … but you were exciting.
clean: I did. I thought maybe you were a nut ... but you were exciting.

heading: Quotes
raw: Clementine: I wish you had stayed.
clean: I wish you had stayed.

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: I wish I had stayed too. Now I wish I had stayed. I wish I had done a lot of things. I wish I had … I wish I had stayed. I do.
clean: I wish I had stayed too. Now I wish I had stayed. I wish I had done a lot of things. I wish I had ... I wish I had stayed. I do.

heading: Quotes
raw: Clementine: Well, I came back downstairs and you were gone!
clean: Well, I came back downstairs and you were gone!

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: I walked out, I walked out the door!
clean: I walked out, I walked out the door!

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: I don't know. I felt like I was a scared little kid, I was like … it was above my head, I don't know.
clean: I don't know. I felt like I was a scared little kid, I was like ... it was above my head, I don't know.

heading: Quotes
raw: Clementine: You were scared?
clean: You were scared?

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: Yeah. I thought you knew that about me. I ran back to the bonfire, trying to outrun my humiliation, I think.
clean: Yeah. I thought you knew that about me. I ran back to the bonfire, trying to outrun my humiliation, I think.

heading: Quotes
raw: Clementine: Was it something I said?
clean: Was it something I said?

heading: Quotes
raw: Joel: Yeah, you said "so go." With such disdain, you know?

heading: Quotes

heading: Quotes

heading: Quotes

heading: Quotes

clean: I can't see anything I don't like about you.

heading: Quotes
